system.effect: Shoulder-mounted laspistol with the Compact upgrade. The user can fire it once per round as a Half Action or Reaction. If used as a Reaction, it does not count toward the normal limit of one attack action on the user's turn. Some versions can later be refitted with another Compact pistol acquired separately.
system.drawbacks: Requires the relevant Mechadendrite Use talent and Cyber-Mantle. A character may not have more mechadendrites than his Toughness Bonus.

description.value: A shoulder-mounted weapons mechadendrite fitted with a compact laspistol. In the core rules this is listed under Cybernetics rather than ordinary gear.

system.notes: Requires relevant Mechadendrite Use talent and Cyber-Mantle.
